programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Team Challenge 4
programme.desc: Teams are asked to prepare six dishes with only one team member cooking at any one time.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 3
programme.desc: Shannon and Arena put themselves forward as the two weakest performers from the Red Team.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - MasterClass 6
programme.desc: Two lucky chefs fly to Malaysia for a private class with Rick Stein.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Qantas Fine Dining Challenge
programme.desc: Contestants pair up and are asked to prepare one of eight courses of Neil Perry's QANTAS First Class menu.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 4
programme.desc: Craig, Michael, Shannon and Rachel face a Heston Blumenthal creation: burger with chips and a milkshake.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Immunity Challenge 6
programme.desc: Kate competes against Darren Purchese, Melbourne's answer to Adriano Zumbo.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Team Challenge 5
programme.desc: In the sustainable food challenge, contestants prepare a lunch service at the Greenhouse "pop up" restaurant.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 03 - Elimination Challenge 5
programme.desc: The losing team face a three-round elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Premiere
programme.desc: 22 contestants are welcomed to Melbourne with their first challenge at the MCG.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Protein Pick Face Off Challenge
programme.desc: After winning the previous challenge, the girls pick the protein they would be cooking with.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 1
programme.desc: The worst performing contestants from the last challenge head into the series' first elimination challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - MasterClass 1
programme.desc: Filmed in front of a live audience, George cooks calf's liver and Gary cooks a sour cherry dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Barossa Boot Camp Day 1
programme.desc: Contestants are tasked with breaking down a whole lamb after a quick masterclass from a professional butcher.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Barossa Boot Camp Day 2
programme.desc: Contestants faced a tag-team challenge set by MasterChef favourite Maggie Beer.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Barossa Boot Camp Day 3
programme.desc: The teams face a seafood relay challenge: shucking oysters, peeling prawns and filleting flathead.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 2
programme.desc: Contestants up for elimination are given two and a half hours to revisit their proteins.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - MasterClass 2
programme.desc: The Barossa Boot Camp comes to an end with a MasterClass featuring great local produce.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Kids Week Sunday Challenge
programme.desc: To Begin Kids Week, the Mystery Box Challenge returned with a twist, followed by the Invention Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Mornington Peninsula Challenge
programme.desc: The top 12 performers from the Mystery Box challenge travel to the Mornington Peninsula.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Salmon Challenge
programme.desc: The remaining contestants are given the choice to compete for one of five spots in the Top 24.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Pressure Test
programme.desc: In their first Pressure Test, Shannon Bennett brings a twist on the classic Peach Melba.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 1
programme.desc: The top 18 contestants travel to Daylesford Lake House for their first MasterClass with Alla Wolf-Tasker.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Elimination Challenge - French Cuisine
programme.desc: The remaining twelve hopefuls faced a French Invention Test set by Jacques Reymond at Montsalvat.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP1
programme.desc: From over 5,000 Applicants the top 50 Junior cooks gather for the first challenges of the Junior MasterChef Series.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP2
programme.desc: The remaining kids have their chance to cook their best dishes for a chance to make it through to the top 20.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP3
programme.desc: The top 20 learn that they will be cooking in an invention test with two core ingredients.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - Episodio 51
programme.desc: Los concursantes tienen la oportunidad de ganar dinero, desde un centavo hasta un millón de dólares.

programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP4
programme.desc: The excited top 12 arrive at the MasterChef Kitchen for the first time.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Celebrity Season 01 - EP9
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia Celebrity Season 01

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Celebrity Season 01 - EP10
programme.desc: The Final three Eamon, Rachael & Kirk battle it out in a three-round Final.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 07 - Auditions: Part 1
programme.desc: A few dozen home chefs battle it out in the MasterChef Kitchen to earn the best chef title

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - MasterClass 6
programme.desc: Heaven and Hell week draws to a close with a special Master Class from Paul Wilson.

programme.title: Immunity Challenge: Dan Hong
programme.desc: Ben battles against celebrity chef Dan Hong in the first immunity pin challenge of the season.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Auditions
programme.desc: Hundreds of hopeful contestants compete for a place in the Top 50.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Immunity Challenge 1
programme.desc: Five contestants face off in an immunity challenge with a twist.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Offsite Challenge 1
programme.desc: The contestants split into teams to make lunch for over 450 very hungry grammar school children.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 3
programme.desc: The tuck shop losing Blue Team faces a two-round Elimination: a skills test followed by a pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - MasterClass 3
programme.desc: Chef Stephanie Alexander visits the kitchen to give a cookery workshop.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Offsite Challenge 2
programme.desc: It's Italian week and the four teams must sell as many meals as possible in Little Italy.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Pressure Test 1
programme.desc: Five amateur chefs make quail ravioli to determine who stays in the contest.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - MasterChef Pizzeria Challenge
programme.desc: Two teams of contestants are left in charge of running a pizza restaurant service.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - Elimination Challenge 4
programme.desc: The 8 losing team competitors must cook their best Italian food to try and keep their places.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 05 - MasterClass 4
programme.desc: Antonio Carluccio shows the contestants how to make silk handkerchief pasta alla Genovese.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 24: Mystery Box
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants enter the MasterChef Australia kitchen for their first mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: King's Cross
programme.desc: In their first Team Challenge, contestants took over the running of two of King's Cross best restaurants.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Pasta
programme.desc: In a three-round pasta-themed challenge, the Red Team fight for their places in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 2
programme.desc: Gary and George demonstrate some seafood recipes for the contestants.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - EP13
programme.desc: In the Mystery Box challenge, contestants are faced with a range of ingredients that have to be "cracked".

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Peter Gilmore
programme.desc: Star chef Peter Gilmore sets the bottom three contestants a Pressure Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP5
programme.desc: In their first offsite challenge, the kids are divided into teams to take over a High School tuck shop.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Junior Season 01 - EP6
programme.desc: 10 kids from our top 50 join us for the first Cook-along MasterClass in the MasterChef Kitchen.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.
